General.Name: K2 F&B HOLDINGS
General.Description: K2 F&B Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, owns and operates food centers and food street in Singapore. It operates in two segments, Rental and Outlet Management, and Food and Beverage Stalls. The company leases food establishment premises to tenants; and provides management, cleaning, and utilities services to tenants. It also retails beverages, tobacco products, and cooked food directly to consumers, such as mixed vegetable rice, zi char, roasted meat, and chicken rice located in food establishments operated and managed by the company and third parties. In addition, the company is involved in the property holding activities. The company was formerly known as K2 Capital Investment Holdings Limited and changed its name to K2 F&B Holdings Limited in December 2018. K2 F&B Holdings Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Singapore. K2 F&B Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Strong Oriental Limited.
